Amazing Offers at Sakura Books!

Discover Your Next Favorite Story – At a Great Price! Dive into our world of literature, manga, and unique stationery with limited-time discounts that make every visit rewarding. Whether you're hunting for a rare find, stocking up on classics, or exploring new genres, our special offers are designed with book lovers like you in mind.

Explore Today's Deals

Current Special Offers

Dive into a new world without breaking the bank! Check out our exciting limited-time deals available right now at Sakura Books:

Used Books - Buy 3, Get 1 Free!

Our pre-loved collection is a treasure trove waiting to be explored. Find vintage paperbacks, out-of-print editions, and beloved classics. Purchase any three used books, and we'll give you the fourth one (of equal or lesser value) absolutely free. It's the perfect chance to stock up on affordable reads and discover hidden gems. Visit our dedicated used books section to browse the ever-changing inventory!

10% Off All Manga This Week!

From shonen adventures and shojo romance to seinen drama and josei slice-of-life, our extensive manga selection caters to every taste. For a limited time, enjoy a 10% discount on *all* manga volumes in stock. Whether you're catching up on a series or starting a new one, now is the ideal moment to expand your collection. Don't miss this chance to grab your favorite titles!

Stationery Bundle Deal

Complement your reading with high-quality writing tools and beautiful notebooks. Our stationery section features unique designs and essential supplies perfect for journaling, note-taking, or sketching. Purchase any full-priced notebook together with any pen set (two or more pens bundled), and receive 15% off the combined price. Get inspired and prepared for your next literary adventure!

Visit Our Store

Our Story at Sakura Books

Sakura Books was established in the vibrant literary district of Jinbocho, Tokyo, back in 1985. Nestled amongst dozens of other esteemed booksellers, we set out to create a space that felt like a second home for readers – a place where the scent of paper and ink filled the air and every bookshelf held the promise of discovery.

Over the decades, our passion for connecting people with stories has only grown stronger. We began primarily as a seller of used and rare Japanese literature, building a reputation for sourcing unique and hard-to-find volumes. As Jinbocho evolved and the tastes of readers broadened, so too did our inventory and vision.

Today, we offer a curated selection that spans popular new releases, international fiction, academic texts, and, reflecting Japan's cultural impact, an extensive collection of manga and comics. Our used book section remains a beloved cornerstone, offering sustainable access to literature and the thrill of stumbling upon an unexpected gem at a great value.

We believe a bookstore is more than just a retail space; it's a cultural hub. Sakura Books hosts author signings, reading circles, and workshops, fostering a community of book lovers. Our cozy in-store cafe provides a quiet retreat where you can relax with a freshly brewed coffee or tea while getting lost in the pages of your latest purchase.

Our team are avid readers themselves, always eager to offer recommendations or help you locate that specific title you're searching for. We understand the joy of holding a physical book, the weight of it in your hands, the tactile pleasure of turning pages. This appreciation for the craft and the experience is at the heart of everything we do.

We are committed to making the world of books accessible and exciting for everyone. Our special offers are just one way we strive to achieve this, ensuring that everyone can find something wonderful to read regardless of their budget. Visiting Sakura Books is an experience – a journey through stories waiting to be discovered, friendships waiting to be made, and moments of quiet contemplation over a cup of coffee.

We are proud to be a part of the rich history of Jinbocho and look forward to welcoming you to our haven for readers. Come explore, relax, and find your next favorite story with us.

More Than Just Books

Sakura Books offers a diverse range of items and experiences designed to enrich your literary life and provide a welcoming space for our community:

New & Used Books

Explore our meticulously curated collection spanning every genre imaginable. Find the latest bestsellers hot off the press, classic literature that has stood the test of time, insightful non-fiction, captivating children's books, and a constantly refreshing stock of high-quality used books offering incredible value and unique discoveries.

Manga & Comics

Immerse yourself in the dynamic world of sequential art. We boast an extensive collection of Japanese manga, from popular series to independent titles, alongside a growing selection of international comics and graphic novels. Find everything from epic fantasy and thrilling sci-fi to heartwarming slice-of-life and historical drama.

Stationery & Supplies

Enhance your reading and writing experience with our selection of fine stationery. Discover elegant notebooks, journals, high-quality pens (including fountain pens and inks), planners, and unique accessories perfect for capturing thoughts, sketching ideas, or simply enjoying the art of putting pen to paper.

E-Books

For the modern reader, we offer a vast digital library. Through our online platform, you can easily browse and purchase e-book versions of many popular titles. Enjoy the convenience of carrying hundreds of books with you on your device, accessible anytime, anywhere.

Cafe & Reading Space

Step into our tranquil cafe space, designed for relaxation and literary enjoyment. Order a fresh coffee, specialty tea, or light snack, find a comfortable chair, and dive into your new book or simply soak in the peaceful atmosphere. It's a perfect escape from the bustling city.

Events & Signings

Join our vibrant literary community by attending one of our regular events. We host author readings and signings, book launches, poetry slams, reading group discussions, and workshops related to writing and illustration. Check our schedule for upcoming gatherings!

Online Store & Shipping

Can't make it to Jinbocho? Our online store brings Sakura Books to you! Browse a wide selection of new and popular used books from the comfort of your home. We offer reliable domestic and international shipping, ensuring your next great read arrives safely at your doorstep.

Hear From Our Happy Readers

Sakura Books is my absolute haven in Jinbocho. I come specifically for their amazing used book selection – I always find something unique I didn't even know I was looking for! The 'Buy 3, Get 1 Free' deal is fantastic value, letting me explore more authors without hesitation. The staff are always friendly and happy to chat about books. It feels like a real community here.

- Akari Sato

Book Enthusiast, Tokyo

The manga discount week is a game-changer! Sakura Books has an incredible range, much wider than other places I've visited. The cafe is also a great spot to just relax and read after browsing. It’s quiet, comfortable, and they make a lovely matcha latte. Definitely my go-to spot when I'm in the area. Highly recommended for both serious readers and casual visitors.

- Hiroshi Yamashita

Suginami Ward Resident

I live abroad but discovered Sakura Books' online store. The process was smooth, and my order of rare Japanese novels arrived in perfect condition faster than I expected! The shipping was incredibly reliable. It's wonderful to have access to such a unique collection from so far away. It feels like bringing a piece of Jinbocho's magic to my home. I'll definitely be ordering again soon.

- Maria Garcia

International Customer

I stumbled upon an author event here last month and was thoroughly impressed. The space felt intimate and perfect for a literary discussion. The staff were organized and the whole atmosphere was welcoming. Beyond the events, their stationery selection is surprisingly good – I found a beautiful journal that has really sparked my creativity. It's a place that supports the whole reading and writing journey.

- Satoshi Nakamura

Nerima Ward

Finding a good bookshop cafe in Tokyo is a joy, and Sakura Books nails it. The blend of a serious bookstore with a relaxing cafe makes it the perfect place to spend an afternoon. I love browsing the shelves, then grabbing a coffee and starting my new book right away. The variety of books means there's always something new to catch my eye. The offers are just a bonus!

- Yuki Kobayashi

Ota Ward

As a student, the used book deals at Sakura Books are a lifesaver. I can find required readings and expand my personal library without spending a fortune. The quality of the used books is consistently good. It's easy to get to from university, and the vibe inside is always conducive to studying or just browsing. A true student-friendly gem!

- Ren Tanaka

Student, Chiyoda City

The staff at Sakura Books are exceptionally knowledgeable. I was looking for a specific, slightly obscure title, and they not only helped me find it but also recommended similar authors I hadn't considered. Their passion for books is truly infectious. It's service like this that makes me return again and again. This is what a real independent bookstore should feel like.

- Mei Saito

Tokyo Reader

Sakura Books is my favorite spot in Jinbocho. The selection is incredible, and I always find amazing deals, especially on used books! The cafe space is so relaxing, perfect for diving into a new book. Plus, their manga selection is top-notch and often has great offers. Visiting feels less like shopping and more like a pleasant exploration.

- Kenji Yamamoto

Tokyo Resident

Visit Us or Get in Touch

Our Location & Details

Find us in the historic Jinbocho district, a true paradise for book lovers. We're easily accessible by public transport and located on the ground floor for your convenience.

  • 17 Kanda-Jinbocho, 1st Floor, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0051, Japan
  • 03-5281-1789
  • info@sakurabooks.jp
  • Business Hours:
  • Monday - Saturday: 10:00 AM - 7:00 PM
  • Sunday: 11:00 AM - 6:00 PM
  • (Closed on national holidays)
